findings.title: Task 8 CLI subcommands have no unit tests in DoD
findings.description: Task 8 adds 3 CLI subcommands but DoD only lists tsc check and manual verification. Testing Strategy promises CLI unit tests.
findings.recommendation: Add unit test DoD items and test file reference.

findings.title: Task 10 DoD undercounts modified files — 13 files not 10
findings.description: Task 10 notes mention spec.md dispatcher and both cli-tools.md rule files beyond the 10 skill/command files. DoD and Artifacts only count 10.
findings.recommendation: Update DoD and Artifacts to include all 13 files.

findings.title: spec_worktree_sync missing conflict check before destructive merge
findings.description: Existing CLI merge checks hasConflicts() before squashMerge(). MCP tool should mirror this.
findings.recommendation: Add conflict check before merge in spec_worktree_sync.

findings.title: worktree.ts approaching 400-line warning threshold
findings.description: Currently 211 lines, will grow to ~320 with new subcommands.
findings.recommendation: Monitor line count; extract if exceeds 350.

findings.title: plan_slug could be optional in spec_worktree_create
findings.description: WorktreeManager.create() accepts undefined specId. MCP tool makes it required.
findings.recommendation: Consider optional plan_slug or document the restriction.

covered: Eliminate Bash shell-outs during spec workflow
Update skill/command files to reference new tools
Slug resolution bridges plan slugs to worktree IDs
